---
title: ""
listing:
  - id: latest-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    categories: false
  - id: latest-innovations
    contents: 
      - title: "Spectral Reflectance Curve"
        description: "Analyze spectral signatures across multiple bands."
        path: "https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/spectral"
        image: "https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Spectral+Curve"
      - title: "Phenology Signature"
        description: "Crop classification based on phenological patterns."
        path: "https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/signature"
        image: "https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Phenology+App"
      - title: "GEE AI Assistant"
        description: "Gemini-powered coding assistant for Earth Engine."
        path: "software.qmd"
        image: "images/geeai.jpg"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
  - id: latest-tutorials
    contents:
      - title: "R for Spatial"
        description: "Guide to spatial analysis using R."
        path: "https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/rspatial/"
        image: "https://placehold.co/400x200/27ae60/ffffff?text=R+Spatial"
      - title: "GEE Tutorials"
        description: "Cloud-based remote sensing with Earth Engine."
        path: "https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/gee/intro.html"
        image: "https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=GEE+Intro"
      - title: "Geo-Python"
        description: "Spatial data science with Python."
        path: "https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/geopython/"
        image: "https://placehold.co/400x200/34495e/ffffff?text=Geo-Python"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
  - id: upcoming-events
    contents:
      - title: "ICC 2026 Keynote"
        description: "The Future of Open Source GIS (August 2026)."
        path: "events.qmd"
        image: "https://placehold.co/400x200/34495e/ffffff?text=ICC+2026"
      - title: "GDG Earth Engine"
        description: "Drought Monitoring with GEE AI Assistant."
        path: "events.qmd"
        image: "images/gdg.jpg"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
  - id: recent-pubs
    contents:
      - title: "Agricultural drought monitoring using GEE"
        description: "Study of Paschim Medinipur district, West Bengal (2024)."
        path: "publications.qmd"
      - title: "Flood vulnerability mapping in Odisha"
        description: "AHP-based study in Google Earth Engine (2025)."
        path: "publications.qmd"
      - title: "Drought Monitoring with Gemini API"
        description: "Presentation at GDG Earth Engine Nairobi."
        path: "publications.qmd"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
page-layout: full
---

::: {.profile-column}
::: {.profile-card}
<div class="profile-img-container">
<img src="images/pulakesh.jpg" class="profile-img" alt="Pulakesh Pradhan">
</div>

# Pulakesh Pradhan
### Ravenshaw University
*Transforming Earth Observation data into actionable insights through AI & Cloud Computing.*

::: {.social-links}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-text-paragraph"></i> ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Pulakesh-Pradhan){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_DhEQHEAAAAJ){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-youtube"></i> YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@SpatialGeography){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email](mailto:pulakesh.mid@gmail.com){.social-btn}
:::


:::
:::

<hr>

## 📌 Latest Insights
::: {#latest-posts}
:::
[<i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View all posts](blog.qmd){.social-btn .mt-2}

<hr>

## 🚀 Featured Innovations
::: {#latest-innovations}
:::
[<i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View all innovations](software.qmd){.social-btn .mt-2}

<hr>

## 📅 Upcoming Events
::: {#upcoming-events}
:::
[<i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View all events](events.qmd){.social-btn .mt-2}

<hr>

## 📖 Featured Tutorials
::: {#latest-tutorials}
:::
[<i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View all tutorials](tutorials.qmd){.social-btn .mt-2}

<hr>

## 📚 Recent Work
::: {#recent-pubs}
:::
[<i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View all publications](publications.qmd){.social-btn .mt-2}
